# Navkar Weldmart

Steel Solutions. Built to Last. Trusted provider of premium iron and steel fabrication services, structural solutions, and material supply serving residential, commercial, and industrial projects across Madhya Pradesh (primarily Indore & Bhopal) since 2012.

## Key Information
- **Owner**: Jinesh Jain
- **Founded**: 2012
- **Main Locations**: Indore & Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India
- **Contact Phone**: +91 96697 69760, +91 62637 21818
- **Contact Email**: navkarweldmart@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/919669769760
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/navkarweldmart/
- **Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)**: 2 Tons or ₹2 Lacs

## Core Services & Products
1. **Structural Fabrication**: Industrial sheds, warehouse sheds, factory sheds, tin sheds, heavy steel frameworks, and industrial structures.
2. **Architectural Metalwork**: Building elevation, railings & balustrades, signboards, gazebos & canopies, restoration & retro fitting.
3. **Residential Fabrication**: Custom gates, security & decorative grills, staircase railings, furniture & interior partitions, bespoke fabrication.
4. **Material Supply**: RHS, SHS, CHS, profile pipes; corrugated, polycarbonate, HR/CR sheets, plates; round, square, flat bright bars; angles, channels, beams, joists; tools, electrodes, cutting wheels, screws, fabrication hardware.

## Project Erection Process
1. **Site Visit**: Personal consultation and measurements.
2. **Estimate & Quotation**: Itemized breakdown of materials, fabrication, transport, and installation.
3. **Fabrication**: Precision workshop-controlled production.
4. **Quality Check**: Rigorous weld and joint inspection.
5. **Installation**: Professional on-site erection.
6. **Project Handover**: Final transitions and quality review.
